raw_consumer_statement:
I was charged more than I should have been in XXXX, I paid the account in full and requested that the account be closed, they assured me they would close the account and then I was auto billed in XXXX and a refund issued. Then it happened again in XXXX and a refund was issued and here we are in XXXX and it has happened again. I called then a requested a refund and they said I will be refunded again. 

My problem is my account was paid in full and I have been billed 3 times since I closed the account and should not have to call them each month for something that should have taken place in XXXX and been settled. I am sure I am not the only person XXXX has done this too and they seen to be aware of it and keep doing it. I have been given assurances each time I call that it won't happen again but yet it has. Now they already overbilled me and that is why rather than keep debating the same thing with them again and again, I chose to just pay the amount and close the account but they keep billing me even after I closed the account. 

I fully intend to file complaints with as many agencies as I can to make the proper authorities aware of this mismanagement of not just my account but more than likely others too.
